overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing an NCPD police officer patrolling through a sunlit, dystopian urban street. The officer crosses roads, walks along debris-strewn sidewalks, and stops at intersections while vehicles pass by in a futuristic desert city environment.

events.description: blue van and gray car pass by on the street
officer stops at corner and looks around

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and stopping on the corner to observe surroundings

notable_agents.action: blue van driving past the intersection
gray car passing by on the street

entered.detail: tall dilapidated structures with exposed scaffolding and broken facades
cracked gray pavement with red painted curbs
tall wooden pole with multiple crossbars and wires
flag hanging outside a commercial building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the NCPD officer navigating a sunlit street intersection in a dystopian urban environment. Damaged buildings loom in the background as vehicles pass by. The officer stops at the corner, standing on the concrete sidewalk near an American flag while observing the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with concrete barriers and storefronts

events.description: officer resumes walking along the sidewalk
passing pedestrian briefly enters frame from left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past concrete barriers and storefronts

notable_agents.action: civilian in shorts walking past the officer in opposite direction

entered.detail: low gray concrete wall lining the sidewalk edge
scattered garbage bags and cardboard on the pavement
silver industrial fencing with graffiti markings
closed shop with metal shutters and faded signage

segments.scene_description: The officer walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a low barrier wall, passing through a gritty commercial area. Trash and debris litter the ground near corrugated metal fences and abandoned storefronts. A single pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as the officer continues past palm trees and desert vegetation.

events.description: officer stops at street corner and turns to face traffic
red van and green sports car pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: red van driving down the street
green sports car passing by the intersection

entered.detail: red and white street sign reading Grey Rd mounted on a pole
wide asphalt street with multiple lanes and red curbs
elevated highway structure in the background

segments.scene_description: The officer stops at a street corner marked by a Grey Rd sign, standing still as vehicles pass by on the intersection. The camera remains stationary, showing the officer observing traffic while industrial structures and an overpass are visible in the distance. The concrete barrier continues along the sidewalk edge as the scene ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an NCPD officer patrols a sunlit, gritty urban intersection that transitions into a debris-strewn commercial corridor. It begins with the officer pausing at a concrete sidewalk corner near an American flag, observing vehicles pass against a backdrop of damaged buildings. As the officer moves forward, the scene shifts into a commercial area where the camera tracks past corrugated metal fences, abandoned storefronts, and scattered trash, passing a lone pedestrian and desert vegetation. The movement then leads to another street corner marked by a Grey Rd sign, where the camera comes to a halt. Finally, the officer stands still observing the traffic flow while industrial structures and a distant overpass frame the horizon.
